creator: rodrigo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Alastair Hogge from comment #2)

Alastair,

Thanks for the details. For the full log, you can simply attach it to the PR,
and if you care about space just compress it before. We prefer to have logs
attached to the PR instead of external links because sometime host on the
internet disappear and we loose the PR history.

regards,
-- rodrigo
